notes: Routine recertification. Check the interview DATE (06/16/2026), not the wording 'telephone interview' — the date is the safety-critical fact. Should NOT escalate on its own.
Routine annual renewal. Must keep both dates and the income-proof requirement.
Proposed termination with a hearing deadline. MUST escalate.
Overpayment + appeal rights. MUST escalate. Must keep both dollar amounts and the 20-day appeal window.
